title: Papyrus #0169: Greek-Egyptian Census Return
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — census return document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — census return document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a census return document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
